architecture.name: Serverless Event-Driven Pipeline
architecture.description: Android SMS triggers an HTTP POST to a Vercel serverless function, which calls OpenAI for NLP extraction, stores the result in a cloud Postgres DB, and serves the data to a static frontend via a separate GET endpoint.

ai_integration.name: Structured JSON Extraction via System Prompt
ai_integration.description: A rigid system prompt constrains the AI to output only a JSON object with fixed keys (amount, type, vendor, category). The response_format is set to json_object to guarantee parseable output. Temperature is set to 0.2 for deterministic results.
ai_integration.ignore_pattern: AI returns {"ignore": true} for unrecognized or declined messages

database.name: Auto-Initializing Schema
database.description: Each serverless function call runs CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS before any query. This eliminates the need for migration scripts and ensures the schema exists on first invocation.
database.connection_strategy: Fallback chain: storage_POSTGRES_URL → DATABASE_URL → POSTGRES_URL → NEON_DATABASE_URL

authentication.name: PIN-Based Admin Guard
authentication.description: Destructive operations (DELETE, PATCH) require a password field in the request body. The PIN is compared server-side against the ADMIN_PASSWORD env var (default: 1234). This is a lightweight guard suitable for a single-user personal tool.

frontend.name: Glassmorphic Dark Mode Design System
frontend.description: A premium UI built with vanilla CSS using layered glass surfaces, ambient mesh gradient backgrounds, SVG noise texture overlays, and cubic-bezier micro-animations. No frameworks or CSS libraries used.

state_management.name: In-Memory Client-Side Filtering
state_management.description: All transactions are fetched once into a global allTransactions array. Filters (type, account, date) are applied client-side without re-fetching from the server. This keeps the UI instant and reduces API calls.
state_management.custom_categories_storage: localStorage key 'customCategories' stores user-created category names as a JSON array

categorization.name: Hybrid AI + Manual Categorization
categorization.description: Initial categorization is done by the AI using a predefined list of 13 categories with merchant-name heuristics. Users can override any category via the re-categorize modal, which persists the change to the database via PATCH /api/update.
categorization.card_type_detection: Category string includes '(Credit)' for English SMS or '(Debit)' for Arabic SMS. Frontend also falls back to checking raw_text for the word 'credit' for bulletproof filtering.

sms_formats.name: CIB Bank SMS Template Matching
sms_formats.description: The AI is trained to recognize exactly 6 CIB SMS formats. Any message not matching these formats is silently ignored.

supported_formats.name: Credit Card Purchase
supported_formats.pattern: Your credit card #{last4} was charged for {amount} at {merchant}...

supported_formats.name: Debit Card Purchase
supported_formats.pattern: تم خصم مبلغ {amount} من بطاقة الخصم المباشر...

supported_formats.name: Instant Transfer Outgoing
supported_formats.pattern: تم تنفيذ تحويل لحظي بمبلغ {amount} من حسابك...

supported_formats.name: Instant Transfer Incoming
supported_formats.pattern: تم تنفيذ تحويل لحظي بمبلغ {amount} إلى حسابك...

supported_formats.name: ATM Withdrawal
supported_formats.pattern: تم سحب مبلغ {amount} من بطاقة الخصم المباشر...
